## Root Cause
The library installation failed due to the inability to access the wheelhouse directory containing the required dependencies.

## Explanation
The error occurs because the serverless compute environment in Databricks cannot access the wheelhouse directory where the required Python packages are stored. This is likely due to incorrect configuration or the wheelhouse directory not being properly uploaded to the cloud storage.

## Fix Description
The fix involves ensuring that the wheelhouse directory is correctly uploaded to the cloud storage and referenced in the serverless_requirements.txt file. Additionally, verify that the cloud storage is properly configured and accessible by the Databricks serverless compute environment.

## Corrected Code

%pip install -r serverless_requirements.txt --find-links /dbfs/path/to/wheelhouse
